Okay all this review will be pretty long.

I have played video games since Atari and I’ve been playing VR for three years.  Let me just say that this game is being dishonored by being on app lab and not the main store.  It is a free game and it functions as intended better than almost 90% of Vr games I played.

Visuals:  as I signed into this game I was taken aback in how crisp the graphics are.  It feels amazing and like you truly are transported into another world.  I walked around the lobby just checking things out.  It is beautiful and felt like a dream come true.

Sound:  sounds feel like they fit the mood with cartoony sounds, the sound does make it feel like you are controlling a distant action figure with sounds.  It truly fits the bill of the game.

Gameplay:  I have not played anything other than brawl, but that feels exactly like a super smash brothers game.  Controls are super simple to understand, and tutorial hits everything you need to know to succeed.  It allows you to return to each station and master basic game mechanics before hopping in.  The button layouts for the game and feel fluid.  I can’t tell you how much it feels like super smash brothers.  It is super smooth as well with no frame drops or lag issues.  I was able to jump right into games without any delay, but the players felt more like bots, but they were named and had different load outs so even if they were I could not tell.  The maps I played were interactive and had traps to avoid.  I enjoy item pick up and head aiming.  It felt intuitive and responsive.  The game made me feel like I was there and not in my living room which is the point of VR.  The only games that do this for me can be counted on one hand.   I normally feel VR should be first person, but controlling the player from an avatar felt natural and it fits the game.  

Cons:  these cons are minor and I am taking VR enthusiast in mind.

Not first person action.  It fits the game, but looking at gameplay would turn off some players, but it really does fit so try it out.

I was kicked out of game a couple of times so it crashes, but not often enough to be a problem.  I’ll update as I find more cons.

To the Devs:  I feel the love you put into the game, and I cannot wait for you to make it to the App Store because this game truly plays better than a majority of apps available in the regular meta quest store.  Great job.

To 2 stars. They only made rank matches free from their Chinese lies.  Dont bother installing

-Please review The bottom Portion of this Review as Opinions have changed. -

reviews.review_title: How is this not more known???
reviews.review_description:
I've had this game months but I haven't touched my car in months. Started playing again recently and went into this game properly for the first time today.

My goodness, what a game, the graphics are sharp and it immerses you, the lobby is a load of fun, rock climbing, a shooting range, a theme park ride, a climbing wall....thats before you even play the game.

A fun super smash bro game in VR, I met a person in there and he showed me the ropes we played a few 2 V 2 and had a great time, another game that's not spammed by screaming kids so that's a massive bonus. Don't sit on the fence it's a free game with loads to do. Hopefully see you in there.
This game looks Pretty good but when I press the machine it brings me to the loading screen but it loads forever

developer_response.body: Thanks for reaching out and glad to hear you like the game! We've addressed the issue with the loading screen. Could you please give it another try and let us know if it's working smoothly now? Your experience matters to us, and we appreciate your patience.

reviews.review_title: don't quit after the first games!!!!
reviews.review_description:
First day i played it i was just spamming the controls and i didn't really know what i was doing. It was a good way of dealing a lot of damage but u don't really see what your opponents are up to. Today i played again and i tried to be a little more thoughtful when playing. It definitely payed off because i won 3 out of 3 games😎 You could compare this with pokémon or any other game you would play with an avatar. But the immersion is just crazy good!!! Very addicting and fun game. For the developers: if i could request one thing it would be voice chat or a way to talk with your teammate in a battle or in the lobby.
Awesome job🔥🔥

Please note I haven't paid for any in-game extras. However, I have played a couple of rounds and if you are looking for some smash bros style gameplay you will have fun! Also, some fun extra mini games to play too 🙂
If you have ever played super smash bros  or brawlhalla it is just like that but in vr and it has amazing controls.

Great start into uncharted territory. 
What are the chances we get an ar mode that would pull alot of people in.

This game is great, love the art, the characters, the whole idea. My kids love brawler games, this is exactly what they were looking for. We can join as a team and play together. A bunch of characters to unlock and progress on. Each with their own moves and specials. The animations and sound effects are great.  So far my favorite character is the Pirate Cat. Can't wait to level him up.

reviews.review_title: THIEVES Stole My $72!!! Do NOT SPEND $$$
reviews.review_description:
I bought the “Ultimate Bundle” ($39.99!) of this, after a few days, because I thought it were a good game and wanted to help the developers. So, I PAID to HELP THEM WORK on THEIR PROJECT, only to be ROBBED!!! Unfortunately, after having STOLEN 7200 PAID GEMS from my account, overnight—equivalent to $72 (at 1 cent apiece). 

Yesterday, I had 14,200 gems, and this morning I have 7,000—along with some PR-speak email about THEIR problem pf having screwed up the distribution of their first paid hero—within the first season, during which I was promised ALL the characters, along with a mail saying I’d gotten that character, but hadn’t. 

NOT a particularly good way to start a goodwill relationship — especially after I’ve spent the past 30 days playing the game, to get my season rewards, which I now have no real interest in getting, ‘cause WHO KNOWS IF I’LL ACTUALLY GET MY REWARDS?

That, on top of the fact that my FIRST accomplishment reward was a DUPLICATE of something I’d gotten for getting the “Ultimate Bundle,” for which I received NO COMPENSATION. So, I guess anytime I get the same thing, again, there goes more of MY MONEY I paid, in good faith, to help what looked like a fair and decent developer. WOW — was I ever WRONG!

If they wouldn’t like to work with me to get those back—with a bonus for my EXTRA WORK, helping them—then I want a FULL REFUND. I’m pretty well soured on this game, especially because I was SAVING my COINS until after the season, because I didn’t wanna get ANOTHER DUP for which I would get nothing, after having spent my US DOLLARS buying it.

Wait for Meta to make sure this game is ON THE LEVEL AND IN THE STORE BEFORE SPENDING ANY MONEY — if you want to support this kind of dev, at all.

I’m glad I started taking PICS of ALL mails & rewards, after getting that dup... including having had 14,200 PAID GEMS, $72 of which are gone. I’m forwarding my pics to Meta to help them decide whether to put their name on it by adding it to the store...

developer_response.body:
Hey there, 

Thank you for your support and we are sorry for the confusion caused by the accidental distribution :(

On July 14 and 17, three internal testing emails were mistakenly sent to all players. These emails included one of 7,200 gems, one of a new Hero Hunt, and one of a Hunt Bundle. Once we realized the error, we quickly retrieved these emails and their contents on July 17, as they were intended only for internal testing purposes. 

If you haven't used the 7,200 gems yet, we will compensate you with 600 gems within the next 3 days.

We have checked your account from our system, and it appears that the balance is the same as it was before this accidental distribution occurred. (Please note that the Ultimate Edition you purchased does not include the new hero Hunt or the 7,200 gems.)

About the duplicated achievement reward, it will be automatically converted into Star Coins, which can be used in the in-game Store for purchases. This ensures that you still receive value for the duplicate and have the opportunity to acquire other items or benefits. You can find related information on the Support center. You can also find the details of the season rewards on the website under the Events page!

If you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to reach out to us by submitting a ticket at [ 𝗵𝘁𝘁𝗽𝘀://𝗾𝘂𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗮𝗮𝗿.𝘇𝗲𝗻𝗱𝗲𝘀𝗸.𝗰𝗼𝗺 ] or ping us in Discord [ 𝗵𝘁𝘁𝗽𝘀://𝗱𝗶𝘀𝗰𝗼𝗿𝗱.𝗴𝗴/𝗾𝘂𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗮𝗮𝗿 ] Our team is here to assist you, and we will respond as quickly as we can.

Thank you again for your ongoing support! And we apologize for any confusion or inconvenience caused. 

Cheers,
Pumpkin VR

reviews.review_description:
I downloaded this game with the understanding that it wasn’t something that I would typically play. With that in mind, I went into it a little skeptical.

However, I really enjoy playing this game! I can play at a pace that is comfortable for me and I find myself thinking about the next time I’ll be able to play.

There are a couple of bugs that I’ve noticed, but with time I’m sure they’ll be patched out. Definitely worth the download!

reviews.review_title: One of the best new free games
reviews.review_description: I haven't played much so far since I'm mostly on later in the day but even the few times I've played has managed to make me keep wanting to come back. I love how all the characters feel super balanced in their own unique ways and no character is too OP. I've always loved Smash growing up and seeing a Smash-like game in VR has really made my dreams come true.

I've only played a few rounds so far but it was enough for me to get a good first impression of the game. The 2 characters that I tried felt unique yet very balanced. The added element of moving yourself to dodge incoming attacks while fighting is a fun spin on the genre. The combat offers a lot more in terms of variety than I was expecting and although I didn't get any kills (just like in smash bros), I did thoroughly enjoy the experience and can't wait to get back into it.

Great job devs. Thanks for a great brawler that I'll be adding to list of go-to games
Been waiting on a smash bros like game to come out on quest and this is by far the best one I’ve seen. I strongly recommend this game

This game is quite literally Super Smash Bros in VR! 15 unique characters, tons of cores to customize your loadouts, and plenty of cosmetics is awesome! Only issue I have is the fact that 4 characters are locked behind a paywall but I get it, it's a free game and they gotta make money somehow

reviews.review_title: I am obsessed with the game 😍😍😍😍
reviews.review_description:
The game is very entertaining and competitive, you can see the love in the development of the game, it flies me the hour playing, it has things to improve, but it is still an excellent game! I play it with my friend between Quest and pico4 and it works perfect. 

Me encanta!!! Vengan a probar este free to play!

reviews.review_title: Great Fun... Just needs more people!
reviews.review_description:
I enjoyed the game, but found it difficult to join matches due to a lack of players.

The gameplay and controls are excellent and the graphics are amazing... And the game is FREE to play as well... Crazy!?!

Definitely worth checking out and playing!

This is absolutely Super Smash Bros VR!  It is one of the absolute best Quest 2 games, and it's absolutely free. There is so much to do in the social Hub that it could be a game in itself. The 2v2 brawling is so much fun with friends and I love the way you can customize your heroes abilities by using cores. How can you not at least go try this game. It's free. 

Check out my 4 min quick review video on YouTube.   https://youtu.be/19-KgIDn3bQ
This game is so fun I could play it for hours and not get bored. This game is one of the best games I have played recently and I'm surprised its still free.

Please put the game on Quest store…Quest can you hear me?
The game is just so good you can feel the hard work the devs have put in to build up the game….I wasn’t so sure if I should download the game seeing some players couldn’t log in the game…but glad I have tried it!
I chose the cat as my first character and I have to say this is by far the most polished game I have ever seen in applab it’s even much more better than most of the games in the store. Each character has its own skills and moves and skins…you can earn coins by completing tasks which are not hard at all but very enjoyable. The combat itself is a whole new experience for me…the trailer looks amazing but I was suspicious about the player view at first…however once entering the game/combat, all the doubts were gone! It just…incredible….incredible…never heard about the team before but guys, you are really amazing and talented!
Still can’t believe it’s a free game…I haven’t bought anything yet as I wanted to test how far I can go with my current characters. Please add more maps and skins, the shark hat is really cute.I will definitely recommend this game to everyone!

reviews.review_title: Beware of the Captain lol my go 2
reviews.review_description:
This game is amazing devs put a lot into it find the character that fits your play style and jump in the fight I have been running Vr software since its launch and this is a much needed title 
Amazing fun 
I love the Fortniteish character design it just works!!

We do need different skins for each character and not just a palette swap of colors 

Devs thank you for your hard work and we are all looking forward to future updates!!!!

The game looks good, the tutorial is easy to follow and fairly balanced! I played a few games and while I was a little intimidated by the avatars of the other players, I've only lost one game against them so far! 

The characters you start with are good to begin with! Levelling up isn't too hard either. If you don't like Smash Bros, do give this game a try, really. It's nothing like that game at all!

reviews.review_title: One of the best seated vr experiences
reviews.review_description:
I love this game, and I can’t wait for more people to start playing, my only complaint is that not enough people know about this game yet, but there is no reason not to get it. If you love smash bros or just want something fun in general. Experimenting with all the characters and different cores helps give the game a nice amount of customization with a nice balance of not making you too ridiculously op. Amazing 
game and I can’t wait to see what they do with the title in the future. Do yourself a favor and pick this one up bois, you won’t regret it.😎

This game really surprised me. I initially expected a somewhat limited experience, due to it being a free to play game. But this is not the case at all. This is a polished, colorful and fun to play party brawler. There's a good variety of characters to unlock, and each one has a unique move-set. The minute to minute game-play is fun, addictive and easy to pick up. There are multiple game modes to choose from as well as a social lounge to hang out with your friends between matches. All in all, there's really a lot here, and everything is very well done. If you're looking for a new way to spend some time with friends, then give Quantaar a try.

I’m not a Super Smash Bros guy but I can certainly appreciate how fun those games are. I can also see that there’s a fighting game void in VR. 

Yes, there’s amazing first person 1v1 combat games like BlastOn, Broken Edge, and Ironlights. They’re all great, but nothing fills that multiplayer party fighting game space. 

Quantaar REALLY goes for it. 

It’s a 1-4 player madcap melee fighter  where you fight in big messy brawls with crazy super moves and LOTS of laughter. But it’s not all fun, there’s also a layer of strategy that gives this game worth repeat spins. 

Along with directly  controlling your fighter in traditional style, the player has a God-like view of the action utilizing devastating and strategic power-ups, sweeping out the most chaotic moments. 

Quantaar can be incredibly hectic, and there’s a lot to dig into the game’s mechanics if you want to go deeper. There’s a very breezy tutorial that goes in depth with the fundamentals if you want to get more committed to beating up Quest users online. 

If you’re like me and 1on1 street fighter is more your speed, I hear you.  Quantaar’s biggest surprise is robust social hub and variety of social activities it offers.  When you’re tired of beating up on friends, do any number of in-game distractions. Bowl. Play music. Do some Darts. Space Golf. Quantaar has a LOT going on. Even if you’re not there for the fighting, like Poker Stars VR, stick around for the goofing around. 

Not a bad incentive to invest in a free-to-play game!

https://youtube.com/shorts/IOYLMuAiVYA?feature=share

developer_response.body:
Hey there, 

Thank you for taking the time to review our game and sharing your thoughts with us! 1on 1 street fighter-like mode sounds like a good idea! It could be an addition to QUANTAAR!

If you're enjoying the social hub or fighting, we would like to kindly request if you could take a moment to update your review to reflect your continued satisfaction with the game. Your updated review holds significant value, not just for us, but also for other potential players who rely on reviews to make informed decisions.

For any questions, please feel free to reach out to us or send suggestions ➡️ https://pumpkinvr.canny.io/quantaar

Once again, thank you for your support, and we hope to see your updated review soon!

Cheers,
Pumpkin VR

reviews.review_title: Great game.  Great Brawler in VR
reviews.review_description: For a free game this is a very good value for the gameplay.   For being the only brawler game in the store it plays very well.   Highly recommended.

One of the best multiplayer VR games to come out this year. I’ve been wanting a multiplayer game that’s not another shooter. This checks all the boxes for me and my community. Can’t believe this game is free, too!

Game is good,  Simple to understand & entertaining. 
Game has bugs though. Like one main one where the game restarts after the match. If you have the option to play this game on PCVR please do. Graphics so much better, hopefully when Quest OS gets V55 the visual performance will improve.

reviews.review_description: Fun combat, great characters, so many cosmetics! (Video review under the same name on YouTube if anybody is interested)
Definitely worth a try! First day had server issues, but the developers seem committed to supporting the game and listening to feedback. Can't wait to see where this game goes!

reviews.review_description: As a long time VR gamer, I can confidently say that Quantaar is one of the best VR experience out there. It’s a game that every VR enthusiast should try!!!
Just like smash Bros but in VR!!!

So I been playing and the team behind the game has been working hard and now the game bugs and glitches are being smoothed out and now I can play the game right and as I can see the game has been much improved, still gonna be tricky for new people but it's gonna be more fun to learn and a lot easier to pick up, still minor things and bugs but stuff that is not impactful in the experience of playing

reviews.review_description:
So this review primarily covers the gameplay itself. I'm not speaking to or about the bugs or technical issues which there are a few, but not many. 

I rated this game 5/5 assuming the small issues I ran into will be fixed in a future update. 

The gameplay is fantastic. Great controls and camera options, each character has personality and is a ton of fun to play. The gameplay feels like a blend of power stone and super smash, but In VR. You have to knock each other off the map in the main mode, in either FFA or 2 v 2 , or you play a soccer game mode. This doesn't even take into account all of the extra game modes you can play with your avatar in the social rooms, like darts, bowling, rock climbing and more. There's just so much variety it's hard to not like it. 

Use code DQIM to get a free 1200 gems. 

Enjoy. It's a fantastic game.
A really good game would recommend it for anyone above the age of like 13 you’ll have fun if you competitive or social better yet both

reviews.review_title: A lot of fun love the game so far
reviews.review_description: I got the game to try it after a YouTube video came out on it and now I really enjoy the game
Tons of content, really surprise me! You guys nailed it, great job!
10/10 would play again and again! 💯

reviews.review_title: Great free game to add to the collection
reviews.review_description: I’ve enjoyed my experience so far and I look forward for more content.
So I click accept on the Japanese term and condition the in refreshes me and also I checked the version and when I tried to change it their was not option

Hi Agent_Rayan, 

Thank you for reaching out to us with your concern. It seems like you accidentally accepted the Japanese terms and conditions and are now facing difficulties switching back to English. We understand how frustrating this can be.

To assist you better, could you please contact us through QUANTAAR Support [https://support.quantaar.com/hc/en-001/requests/new] or join our official Discord [https://discord.gg/quantaar]? Our team will be more than happy to guide you through the process.

Thank you for your understanding, and we look forward to helping you resolve this issue.

reviews.review_description: Unbelievable VR immersion, stunning graphics, and epic gameplay. A must-play for VR enthusiasts! 🚀🔥
Multiplayer VR Thrills for Non-stop fight!

Choose your role wisely and conquer in this dynamic VR world! but exconsider introducing additional game modes for even more variety. More diverse gameplay options would keep players engaged for longer periods.
Very impressive.
Only played with the bots so far, because I want to win when playing with real players. Still training and improving my skills.

I've been trying out a bunch of VR games lately and I gotta say, "Quantaar" is one of the sickest games out there! It's so different from anything else I've played. You get to control your favorite hero and battle other players. At first, they give you a free hero to play, and I totally recommend picking CAPTAIN FURY. He looks super cool and is really strong, I can't get enough of it!
Such a great to play with friends or even solo. But the bots are easy. The combat is really thrilling when playing with real humans.
Unmatched VR immersion, stunning graphics, and thrilling gameplay. A true virtual reality masterpiece!
Accidentally saw it on Facebook and didn't expect it to be so good!
Give it a try and you won't regret it. The free version is sellable and better than most of the VR games imo, the devs are nice to make it free.
5 stars for me!
I actually made some friends here 🥺
Unites VR heroes! but improving the matchmaking system can enhance the competitive experience. Balanced teams and fair matchups would take this game to the next level.!
Fight with Friends in 2v2 and Soccer Modes is exciting!

As a fighting game lover, I have played all kinds of fgs and finally there's one for VR. The movement is smooth, the characters are well designed, the skills are incredible, and the animation sometimes is a bit laggy (not sure if it's caused by my connection). Hope the game can have more game modes like 2 players only. I'm satisfied with the current game modes but you know, players will just want more :)
I'm blown away by the level of detail and craftsmanship in this game. This game deserves all the recognition and their team too!
We need more players to join the game so that I can meet more real humans. Streamers y'all should play this game...Apart from that I'm very happy with this❤️

QUANTAAR is an absolute blast! It's one of the most fun and thrilling VR games I've played. 
Highly recommended! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

It's a PVP game so winning is what matters to me. But if your friends are not online and you can only end up pairing with other random gamers, unfortunately, most of them lack skills or just don't know what they are doing. If you want to level up or gain rewards, choose deathmatch play single. Otherwise you will be dragged into the defeat swamp again and again. If what I say makes sense to you, we should start considering forming a squad.
You will regret not being an early adopter of it. THIS GMAE IS EPIC!!
